image_prompt: A surreal, vibrant image of a gigantic, antique brass key floating in front of a tiny, intricately detailed door embedded in a massive, ancient tree trunk. The key is perfectly aligned with the keyhole, suggesting an impending opening. The text 'A chave abre a porta.' is etched into the bark of the tree around the door. The lighting is magical, almost fairytale-like, with glowing elements and deep shadows, cinematic quality.
caption: Parece óbvio, né? Mas quantas vezes a gente procura a 'chave' certa para abrir novas portas na vida? 🤔 Às vezes, a solução está bem na nossa frente! #Chave #Porta #Reflexão #Óbvio #AbrirCaminhos
